name: Client Reporting
description: Recurring client reporting flow with data pull, analysis, and narrative generation.

args.code: const payload = JSON.parse(String(await skill('fetch_url', { url: 'https://example.com/client/metrics.json', format: 'json' }))); return { total: payload.length ?? 0, sample: payload.slice?.(0, 5) ?? payload };

args.prompt: Create a concise weekly client report from this data: {{shape_metrics.result}}. Include wins, risks, and next actions.
